title: Applicant Resume — Vrithika K. M.
originalText:
Vrithika K. M.
Email: vrithika.km@gmail.com | Phone: +91-98765-43210 | DOB: 14/10/2004
Address: 12 Elm Street, Bangalore, Karnataka, 560001
SSN: 987-65-4321

EDUCATION
B.Tech in Computer Science, VIT University (Vellore Institute of Technology)

EXPERIENCE
Software Dev Intern at InnovateTech Corp. (July 2025)
- Assisted Senior Developer John Doe on React projects.

spans.reasoning: Identified as the main subject's name in the header of the resume.
spans.reasoningWorried: We redacted this because sharing your full name on public platforms opens you up to social engineering and identity theft.

spans.reasoning: Standard email format detected associated with the applicant.
spans.reasoningWorried: Email addresses are prime targets for spam campaigns and phishing attempts. Redacting this keeps your inbox secure.

spans.reasoning: Matches standard international phone number structure.
spans.reasoningWorried: Your phone number can be exploited to trace your location or conduct SIM-swapping attacks. Keeping it hidden is safest.

spans.reasoning: Identified as a date of birth.
spans.reasoningWorried: Date of birth is a key credential used by banks and services for verification. Exposing it online increases fraud risk.

spans.reasoning: Detected physical residential address containing street, city, state, and postal code.
spans.reasoningWorried: Revealing your home address presents real-world physical safety concerns. We keep your exact location private.

spans.reasoning: Matches National Identification (SSN) pattern of XXX-XX-XXXX.
spans.reasoningWorried: An SSN is the ultimate key to identity fraud. Leaving it visible is extremely high risk and must be avoided.

spans.reasoning: Identified as an organization (educational institution). Confidence score is below threshold.
spans.reasoningWorried: This institution name was kept because school names are standard on resumes and are generally considered low risk.

spans.reasoning: Identified as an employer organization but kept visible to maintain context of work history under typical job application policies.
spans.reasoningWorried: We allowed this company name to stay visible because removing work history details makes a resume unreadable to employers.

spans.reasoning: Date of employment duration. Marked as safe to keep according to standard resume analysis policies.
spans.reasoningWorried: Employment timelines are left visible to show your experience length, which poses minimal identity risk.

spans.reasoning: Detected as a third-party name in the description of experience.
spans.reasoningWorried: We redacted this colleague's name to respect their privacy and prevent mapping your professional network without consent.
